headline: Plug Power’s Hydrogen Bet Is Starting To Look Real Again
summary: Plug Power (NASDAQ: PLUG) stock has staged a surprising comeback in 2026. After once trading above $1,500 and falling below $1 in 2025, PLUG is now up more than 70% year to date, trading around $3.78 as of mid-May.
